paragraphs.text: 我有一个漂亮的日记本，是妈妈送给我的生日礼物。日记本的封面有一只可爱的小熊。
paragraphs.translation: I have a beautiful diary, a birthday gift from Mom. The cover has a cute little bear on it.

paragraphs.text: 每天晚上，我都会在日记本上写下今天发生的事情。开心的事、难过的事、有趣的事，我都记下来。
paragraphs.translation: Every evening, I write down what happened today in my diary. Happy things, sad things, interesting things, I write them all down.

paragraphs.text: 写日记让我觉得很开心。以后长大了再看，一定很有意思。你们也写日记吗？
paragraphs.translation: Keeping a diary makes me happy. It will be so interesting to read them when I grow up. Do you keep a diary too?
